inputs.label: Total Food Purchased (kg)
inputs.businessContext: Total weight of food purchased in a given period. Based on inventory management standards (APICS).

inputs.label: Waste Percentage (%)
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of purchased food that is wasted. Industry benchmark from Lean Six Sigma waste reduction.

inputs.label: Average Cost per kg ($)
inputs.businessContext: Average purchase cost per kg of food. Financial input for margin calculation.

inputs.label: Average Selling Price per kg ($)
inputs.businessContext: Average selling price per kg of food. Used to compute lost revenue.

inputs.label: Period (days)
inputs.businessContext: Time period for analysis. Standard reporting period (monthly).

inputs.label: Data Confidence Level
inputs.businessContext: Subjective confidence in data accuracy. Adjusts final result for uncertainty (ISO 9001 data quality).

thresholds.wastePercentage > 10: Critical: Waste percentage exceeds 10% - immediate action required
thresholds.wastePercentage > 5: Warning: Waste percentage above 5% - review processes

suggestedActions: Implement inventory management system to reduce waste
Conduct root cause analysis for waste (Lean Six Sigma)
Train staff on proper food handling and storage
Review supplier quality and portion control
